EMGPlacementSchemeDescription: Four grids were carefully positioned side-to-side with a 4-mm distance between the electrodes at the edges of adjacent grids. The 256 electrodes were centered to the muscle belly (right tibialis anterior or vastus lateralis) and laid within the muscle perimeter identified through palpation. Two bands damped with water were placed around the ankle as ground (R2) and reference (R1) electrodes.
SkinPreparation: The skin was shaved and cleaned with an abrasive pad and water.
TaskDescription: Trapezoidal contraction: MVC level: 40 % MVC; MVC rate during ramps: 5 % MVC / s; plateau duration: 20 s.
Instructions: Follow path provided via visual feedback.
